appointment.booked.title: Appointment booked successfully
appointment.booked.body: Your appointment on {requestedDate} from {startTime} to {endTime} at {clinicName} with Dr. {doctorName} has been confirmed.

appointment.cancelled.title: Appointment cancelled
appointment.cancelled.body: Your appointment on {exceptionDate} has been cancelled. Doctor: {doctorName}. Clinic: {clinicName}.

notifications.wallet.top_up.title: Wallet topped up
notifications.wallet.top_up.body: Your wallet was topped up with {amount}. New balance: {balanceAfter}.

notifications.medical_history.created.title: Medical history created
notifications.medical_history.created.body: A medical history record was created for appointment {appointmentId}.

notifications.ratings.new_rating.title: New doctor rating
notifications.ratings.new_rating.body: A new rating of {score} stars was submitted.

notifications.appointments.completed.title: Appointment completed
notifications.appointments.completed.body: Your appointment at {clinicName} has been completed.

notifications.violations.suspended.title: Account suspended
notifications.violations.suspended.body: Your account was suspended after {noShowCount} missed appointments.

notifications.wallet.frozen.title: Wallet amount frozen
notifications.wallet.frozen.body: An amount of {amount} was frozen for appointment {appointmentId}.

notifications.wallet.refund.title: Wallet refund processed
notifications.wallet.refund.body: A refund of {amount} was processed for appointment {appointmentId}.

notifications.referrals.consumed.title: Referral consumed
notifications.referrals.consumed.body: Your referral #{referralId} was used for appointment {appointmentId}.

notifications.appointments.no_show.title: Appointment marked as no-show
notifications.appointments.no_show.body: Your appointment was marked as no-show.

referral.expiring_soon.title: Referral expiring soon
referral.expiring_soon.body: Your referral to {clinicName} {doctorName} will expire on {expiresAt}.

referral.created.title: New referral created
referral.created.body: A new referral has been created for you and expires on {expiresAt}.

schedule.request_approved.title: Schedule request approved
schedule.request_approved.body: Your schedule update request has been approved.

schedule.request_rejected.title: Schedule request rejected
schedule.request_rejected.body: Your schedule update request has been rejected.

queue.patient_called.title: Next patient called
queue.patient_called.body: You have been called from the queue at {clinicName}.

queue.consultation_completed.title: Consultation completed
queue.consultation_completed.body: Your medical visit has been completed successfully.

queue.patient_skipped.title: Queue position skipped
queue.patient_skipped.body: Your queue position at {clinicName} has been skipped.

invitation.created.title: New doctor invitation
invitation.created.body: You were invited to join the system. The activation link is valid until {expiresAt}.

invitation.cancelled.title: Invitation cancelled
invitation.cancelled.body: Your previous system invitation has been cancelled.

doctor.schedule.approved.title: Schedule approved
doctor.schedule.approved.body: Your updated medical schedule has been approved.

doctor.schedule.rejected.title: Schedule rejected
doctor.schedule.rejected.body: Your schedule change request has been rejected.

operation.created.title: Operation Scheduled
operation.created.body: A surgical operation has been scheduled for you on {requestedDate} from {startTime} to {endTime}. Please complete the payment before the operation date.
